channel.title: coding on Glyphack
channel.description: Recent content in coding on Glyphack

item.title: Rate Limiter From Scratch in Python Part 1
item.description: Introduction After reading ByteByteGo course motivated me to write a rate limiter. So I decided to do it in 500lines theme. We are going to focus on how to create the interfaces and components, to allow extensibility in the predicted ways. You can find the full source code here. What is a Rate Limiter? Well there are a lot of great explanations on what is a rate limier but I’ll give a very small introduction to it for this post.
